title: sesleria corsica
intro: Sesleria corsica, also known as Corsican wood-fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sesleria corsica include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Sesleria corsica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
